label: Application Submitted
description: Your Form 6 has been received by the ERO. You'll get a reference number.
whereToCheck: NVSP portal → 'Track Application Status' or Voter Helpline App

label: Under Verification (BLO Visit)
description: A Booth Level Officer will visit your address to verify details. Keep original documents ready.
whereToCheck: NVSP portal or Voter Helpline App. You may also receive SMS.

label: Name Added to Electoral Roll
description: Once verification is successful, the ERO approves your application and your name is added to the electoral roll.
whereToCheck: Search at electoralsearch.eci.gov.in or via the Voter Helpline App.

label: EPIC / e-EPIC Issued
description: Your Voter ID Card is generated. Download the e-EPIC digitally or collect the physical card from your ERO office.
whereToCheck: Download e-EPIC from voterportal.eci.gov.in or Voter Helpline App.
